materials.name: genuine leather
materials.notes: Can be produced from carefully selected leather offcuts when suitable pieces are available.

personalization.productionNotes: Confirm spelling before production. For corporate gifts, collect initials or logo requirements in a shared file.

production.teamNotes: Small accessory suitable for workshop production, corporate gifts and offcut reuse.

story.ka: პატარა, ყოველდღიური ნივთი, რომელსაც პირადი ნიშანი აქვს. ბარათების ჩასადები მზადდება ხელით და შეიძლება შეიქმნას ტყავის დარჩენილი ნაჭრებისგანაც, როცა მასალა ზომითა და ხარისხით შესაბამისია.
story.en: A small everyday object with a personal detail. This cardholder is handmade and can be produced from selected leather offcuts when the material size and quality are suitable.
story.craftNotes: Cut, assembled, stitched and finished by hand in COSMO's production workflow.
story.originNotes: Designed as a practical Georgian handmade accessory for personal or corporate gifting.

circularity.reuseDescription: The product can help reuse smaller leather pieces that remain after bag production.
circularity.claimsReview: Avoid claiming zero waste. Say that the product supports more responsible use of suitable leftover materials.

ecommerce.seoTitle: Personalized Leather Cardholder Handmade in Georgia
ecommerce.metaDescription: Handmade leather cardholder by COSMO with optional initials or engraving. A practical personalized gift crafted in Georgia.

careInstructions.ka: შეინახეთ მშრალ ადგილას. გაწმინდეთ რბილი, მშრალი ქსოვილით. საჭიროების შემთხვევაში მიმართეთ COSMO-ს შეკეთების სერვისს.
careInstructions.en: Keep in a dry place. Clean with a soft dry cloth. Contact COSMO's repair service when needed.

ecommerce.shippingNotes: Suitable for local store pickup, courier delivery and international small-parcel shipping.

b2b.wholesaleNotes: Suitable for corporate gifts, museum shops and concept stores looking for small personalized accessories.
b2b.buyerPositioning: Accessible handmade Georgian gift item with personalization and responsible material-use story.
